events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legend that is Lionel Richie! What’s your all-time favourite track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Cyndi Lauper was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday! From 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', her distinctive voice and style defined an era. What's your top Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter George Michael was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Tribute to George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move millions. What's your favourite George Michael song?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: On June 25, 2009, 'The King of Pop' Michael Jackson died in Los Angeles at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering The King of Pop
angles.copy: Remembering Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009. His iconic music and groundbreaking videos changed the landscape of pop forever. What's the MJ track that means the most to you?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, and songwriter Ringo Starr was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to The Beatles' legendary drummer, Ringo Starr! Peace and love to you, Ringo.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo or track that truly showcases his genius?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock and Roll Icon
angles.copy: Get your moves ready! It's Mick Jagger's 83rd birthday today. The Rolling Stones frontman continues to defy age. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. It changed music forever. Did you catch it when it first aired?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped their seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your standout track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, the Woodstock Festival brought together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. What an incredible moment in history. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, 'The King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy as 'The King of Rock and Roll' lives on. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: American rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died six days later on September 13.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Tupac Shakur, who was shot on this day in 1996. His impact on hip-hop and music culture is undeniable. What's his most powerful track for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: American rock icon Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. A true guitar visionary whose influence echoes through generations. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic zebra crossing, those timeless tracks. What's your go-to song from their final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The iconic voice of The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock and roll swagger. What's your top tune with Liam on vocals?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK. A powerful message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. Suddenly, '1,000 songs in your pocket' became a reality and changed how we listened to music forever. Did you get one of the originals?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy since 'Dr. No' premiered in 1962. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?
